title: シンザン記念の後に・栄冠へRUN

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle stands out at the Shinzan Kinen with
a powerful run and demonstrates her mastery of
sprints.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With plenty of momentum to spare, her next step
is to clear the main hurdle in the selection
process—clinching the Best Sprinter award.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle enters the NHK Mile Cup—the race
that decides the classic-year King of the Mile.
